business.name: Downtown Smile Studio
business.tagline: Modern dentistry in the heart of the city. Calgary's choice for cosmetic and general dental care.
business.description: Downtown Smile Studio offers a full range of dental services in a sleek, central location. From routine care to advanced cosmetic and restorative treatments, we help you achieve and maintain a healthy, confident smile.

hero.headline: Dental care that fits your life.
hero.subheadline: General, cosmetic, and restorative dentistry in downtown Calgary. Convenient hours, transparent pricing, and a team that cares.

services.name: General Dentistry
services.description: Exams, cleanings, fillings, and preventive care to keep your smile healthy year after year.

services.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Whitening, veneers, bonding, and Invisalign. We tailor treatments to your goals and budget.

services.name: Restorative & Emergency
services.description: Crowns, bridges, root canals, and same-day emergency appointments when you need them most.

insurance.accepted: We accept most insurance plans and submit claims on your behalf. Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) welcome.
insurance.payment: Payment plans and upfront estimates. We believe in no-hidden-fee, stress-free care.

about.headline: City-centre dentistry done right.
about.body: Downtown Smile Studio brings together experienced clinicians and modern technology in a convenient downtown Calgary location. We focus on clear communication, comfort, and results that last.

testimonials.author: Amanda R.
testimonials.quote: Convenient location, friendly staff, and my veneers look incredible. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.author: Chris B.
testimonials.quote: Had a dental emergency and they got me in the same day. Professional and reassuring.

testimonials.author: Nina P.
testimonials.quote: Finally a dentist who explains everything and doesn't rush. My whole family comes here now.

seo.title: Downtown Smile Studio | Cosmetic & General Dentistry Calgary | New Patients Welcome
seo.description: Downtown Smile Studio — general and cosmetic dentistry in downtown Calgary. Accepting new patients and CDCP. Book your appointment.
